description_long: This sculpture depicts a stylized human figure standing upright on a rectangular base. The figure has exaggerated, rounded limbs and a prominent, textured headdress or hair that curves backward. The arms are bent at the elbows and extended forward, with hands shaped as if grasping or holding an invisible object. The facial features are simplified, with a pronounced nose, closed lips, and almond-shaped eyes. The surface is dark and matte, with visible rivet-like details along the torso and limbs, suggesting a metallic construction. The overall form is robust and abstract, evoking a sense of strength and presence.
description: A dark, stylized human figure sculpture with rounded limbs, a textured headdress, and forward-reaching arms, standing on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and both arms extended forward, with the headdress and facial features clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left rear three-quarter view highlighting the curved headdress, the back, and the side profile of the arms and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the headdress, the spine, and the rounded forms of the legs and arms.
description_view_3: Right front three-quarter view showing the right side of the face, the forward-reaching arms, and the curvature of the headdress.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.

license_info.creator_display_name: Museo Nacional de Historia Natural de Chile
